# Esseal

> Esseal is a senior-led custom software engineering firm registered in England & Wales (No. 17026190), with offices in London, UK and Lahore, Pakistan. The firm specialises in full-stack development, rapid MVP creation, and legacy codebase modernisation for SMEs and enterprise clients. Every project is staffed exclusively by senior engineers with a minimum of 5 years of hands-on experience — no juniors, no handoffs. Esseal has delivered 38 projects across 7 years, maintaining an average client retention of 2+ years. Sectors served include construction, healthcare, logistics, e-commerce, and telecommunications.

## Services

- [MVP Development](https://www.esseal.co.uk/services/mvp-development): Investor-ready MVPs delivered in 4–6 weeks using Ruby on Rails, React, and Flutter. Ruthless scope prioritisation, no throwaway code, and post-launch agile support. Equity-based partnerships available for early-stage founders.
- [Legacy Codebase Modernisation](https://www.esseal.co.uk/services/legacy-codebase-upgrade-modernization): Zero-downtime upgrades of outdated PHP (including PHP 3–5 to Laravel 12) and Ruby applications to current stable versions. Parallel QA testing against production environments. Every change documented; Esseal absorbs the cost of its own mistakes.
- [Full Stack Development](https://www.esseal.co.uk/services/fullstack-development): End-to-end application engineering from concept to deployment. Veteran engineering pairs with a single point of accountability. Stack: Next.js, Ruby on Rails, Node.js, Docker, GitHub Actions.
- [Backend Development](https://www.esseal.co.uk/services/backend-development): Scalable API architecture (REST & GraphQL), high-concurrency system design, database engineering, and cloud infrastructure. Stack: Ruby on Rails, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS.
- [Frontend Development](https://www.esseal.co.uk/services/frontend-development): High-performance, accessible interfaces optimised for Core Web Vitals and Server-Side Rendering. Stack: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Vanilla CSS.
- [Internal Tools & Dashboards](https://www.esseal.co.uk/services/internal-tools-dashboards): Custom ERPs, HRMS, inventory management systems, CMS, and analytics dashboards. Specialises in digitising complex paper and Excel-based workflows for construction, manufacturing, and logistics companies.
- [Product Development](https://www.esseal.co.uk/services/product-development): Technical co-founder partnerships for startups. End-to-end execution from architecture through deployment, with equity-based engagement models available.

## Open Source Products

- [Esseal DataTable](https://www.esseal.co.uk/products/esseal-data-table): Free, open-source virtualized React data grid built with pure Vanilla CSS. Zero external dependencies. Supports 100,000+ rows via DOM virtualization, column pinning (left/right), multi-level row grouping, column resizing, and built-in state persistence. MIT licensed. No Tailwind required.
- [EssealDatePicker](https://www.esseal.co.uk/products/esseal-date-picker): Free, zero-dependency JavaScript date picker library. Under 5kb gzipped. Supports date range selection — a feature absent from most free pickers. Fully framework-agnostic (React, Vue, Angular, Vanilla JS). MIT licensed. No Moment.js or jQuery required.

## Company

- [About Esseal](https://www.esseal.co.uk/about): Background, team, and engineering philosophy. Senior-only staffing model with named developers on every engagement.
- [Technical Expertise](https://www.esseal.co.uk/expertise): Full engineering stack — Ruby on Rails, React, Next.js, Flutter, Node.js, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS, TypeScript, Vanilla CSS, GitHub Actions, and legacy system architecture.
- [Contact](https://www.esseal.co.uk/contact): Direct access to Esseal's senior leadership. Offices in London (128 City Road, EC1V 2NX) and Lahore (114-A Gul E Daman Society).

## Blog

- [Engineering Blog](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/): Technical insights, architecture deep-dives, and software engineering opinions from Esseal's senior team.
- [PHP 3 to Laravel 12: Legacy Code Modernization](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/php-3-to-laravel-12-legacy-code-modernization): How Esseal approaches multi-generation PHP upgrades without downtime.
- [Senior-Led MVP vs Junior Team](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/senior-led-mvp-vs-junior-team): Why senior-only teams produce faster, more maintainable MVPs than mixed or junior-heavy squads.
- [Rewrite vs Refactor: The CTO Dilemma](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/rewrite-vs-refactor-dilemma-cto-guide): A decision framework for CTOs choosing between full rewrites and incremental refactoring.
- [Post-Launch Reality: MVP Maintenance](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/post-launch-reality-mvp-maintenance): What happens after an MVP ships — and why most teams are unprepared for it.
- [Scalable & Secure MVP Architecture](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/scalable-and-secure-mvp-architecture): Architecture patterns that let an MVP grow without a full rebuild.
- [Modernizing Monoliths with Zero Downtime](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/modernizing-monoliths-zero-downtime): Techniques for incrementally modernising monolithic codebases in production.
- [Bespoke Software Development & Outsource Roulette](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/bespoke-software-development-outsource-roulette): The hidden risks of outsourcing bespoke software and how to avoid them.
- [The Black Box Problem in Outsourcing](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/the-black-box-problem-in-outsourcing): Why lack of visibility into outsourced development kills projects — and what to demand instead.
- [Why Temporary Code Kills Growth](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/why-temporary-code-kills-growth): The compounding cost of "we'll fix it later" engineering decisions.
- [What Is SRE? Fractional SRE for Startups](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/what-is-sre-fractional-sre-for-startups): Site Reliability Engineering explained for founders, and how startups can access it fractionally.
- [From Excel to Web App: Digitization](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/from-excel-to-web-app-digitization): How businesses replace Excel-based operations with purpose-built web applications.
- [Buying vs Building Software: SaaS Failure](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/buying-vs-building-software-saas-failure): When off-the-shelf SaaS fails and bespoke development becomes the better investment.
- [Convert Excel Sheet to Web App](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/convert-excel-sheet-to-web-app): A practical guide to digitising Excel-based workflows into production web applications.
- [Hidden Risks: Outdated Software Security & Compliance](https://www.esseal.co.uk/blogs/hidden-risks-outdated-software-security-compliance): The security and compliance exposure created by running legacy software versions.
